name: polymarket-whale-copier
description: Polymarket whale copy-trading bot — discovers profitable wallets from the leaderboard, monitors their positions in real-time, and auto-executes copy trades via the CLOB API with full risk management.

scripts.test: node --check index.mjs && node --check whale-discovery.mjs && node --check signal-monitor.mjs && node --check clob-executor.mjs && node --check risk-manager.mjs && node --check moralis-pusd-tracker.mjs && node --check moralis-wallet-profiler.mjs && node --check whale-scoring-v2.mjs && node --check pnl-logger.mjs && node --check whale-sources-v2.mjs && echo 'All files syntax OK'
